records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you would have dug a hole in the ground and hid...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you would have dug a hole in the ground and hid...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you would have dug a hole in the ground and hid...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did not expect a cornered mouse to rear her head out first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did not expect a cornered mouse to rear her head out first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did not expect a cornered mouse to rear her head out first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came out to get some fresh air.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came out to get some fresh air.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came out to get some fresh air.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has been eons since I last took a stroll this far out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has been eons since I last took a stroll this far out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has been eons since I last took a stroll this far out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard a devil was leeching off the Golden Tree to preserve her humanity...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard a devil was leeching off the Golden Tree to preserve her humanity...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard a devil was leeching off the Golden Tree to preserve her humanity...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing how you have ventured so far, it seems that you have chosen to let go of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing how you have ventured so far, it seems that you have chosen to let go of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing how you have ventured so far, it seems that you have chosen to let go of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is your reasoning? Were you tired of the hateful gazes of humans after they found out your true identity?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is your reasoning? Were you tired of the hateful gazes of humans after they found out your true identity?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is your reasoning? Were you tired of the hateful gazes of humans after they found out your true identity?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, I left because I was tired.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, I left because I was tired.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, I left because I was tired.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because now, I will have to convince the newborns that I am not an evil devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because now, I will have to convince the newborns that I am not an evil devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because now, I will have to convince the newborns that I am not an evil devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What useless worrying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What useless worrying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What useless worrying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Human history of this world ends with the unrising sun. Then, it will be forgotten forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Human history of this world ends with the unrising sun. Then, it will be forgotten forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Human history of this world ends with the unrising sun. Then, it will be forgotten forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is what my sister wanted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is what my sister wanted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is what my sister wanted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft, your sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft, your sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft, your sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are merely a puppet made from the power of Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are merely a puppet made from the power of Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are merely a puppet made from the power of Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So are you pretending to be her sister as if you were a living human?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So are you pretending to be her sister as if you were a living human?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So are you pretending to be her sister as if you were a living human?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I hit too close to home?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I hit too close to home?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I hit too close to home?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Borrowing the power of the Golden Tree to block my attack?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Borrowing the power of the Golden Tree to block my attack?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Borrowing the power of the Golden Tree to block my attack?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Clever for a devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Clever for a devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Clever for a devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not think that all devils are the same as your spineless underlings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not think that all devils are the same as your spineless underlings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not think that all devils are the same as your spineless underlings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Golden Tree gave birth to fairies, I am the eldest of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the Golden Tree gave birth to fairies, I am the eldest of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Golden Tree gave birth to fairies, I am the eldest of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That power of yours is most certainly borrowed from the Golden Tree's grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That power of yours is most certainly borrowed from the Golden Tree's grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That power of yours is most certainly borrowed from the Golden Tree's grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The imperfect Golden Tree will soon reveal its limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The imperfect Golden Tree will soon reveal its limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The imperfect Golden Tree will soon reveal its limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you not think that your sword will break before that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you not think that your sword will break before that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you not think that your sword will break before that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come hither, Apostle of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come hither, Apostle of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come hither, Apostle of the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will engrave in that thick doll head of yours...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will engrave in that thick doll head of yours...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will engrave in that thick doll head of yours...

records.m_Talk_ENG: what a devil truly is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: what a devil truly is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: what a devil truly is.
